finding: ATM hook guidance emitted a `requiredCommand` containing `&&`, which fails in the current Windows PowerShell surface and repeats the exact shell-syntax class of dogfood failure the owner asked agents to avoid.
expectedBehavior: ATM guidance should emit Windows-safe command sequences or shell-specific variants instead of assuming POSIX/cmd-style command separators.
evidenceOrRepro: During backlog commit, the hook warning `ATM_HOOK_COMMIT_ACTOR_NOT_EXPLICIT` returned `node atm.mjs identity clear --json && node atm.mjs identity set ...`; a previous attempt to use `&&` in this thread failed with PowerShell `The token '&&' is not a valid statement separator in this version`.
followUp: Add shell-aware command rendering for guidance/hook messages, prefer separate commands in JSON arrays, and update first-layer skills to avoid PowerShell-hostile examples.
